hooks.command: sh -c 'EXT="${CLAUDE_FILE_PATH##*.}"; if [ "$EXT" = "py" ]; then python -m ruff check "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -20 || python -m mypy "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --no-error-summary 2>&1 | head -20; elif [ "$EXT" = "ts" ] || [ "$EXT" = "tsx" ]; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi'
